title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.050 - Petition, where filed
text:
236.050.  Petition, where filed. — Such petition shall be filed in the circuit court of the county within which the petitioner proposes to erect such mill, electric power and light works, or other machinery.
(RSMo 1939 § 10290) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9161; 1919 § 7403; 1909 § 5460
